title: Internal naming cleanup: beads→binds in DB schema, git config keys, variable names
description:
Remaining internal 'beads' references that don't affect users but are confusing for contributors:
- beads.db filename → binds.db (needs migration path)
- git config keys: beads.role, merge.beads.driver
- Go variable names: beadsDir, FindBeadsDir, hasBeadsProjectFiles, etc.
- Package name: internal/beads/ → internal/binds/
- BEADS_DIR env var → BINDS_DIR
- config table key naming
Tier 4 rename — purely internal, no user impact. Consider doing alongside beads_rust rewrite if that happens.
notes: DEFERRED 2026-04-23: user reconsidering 'binds' name itself — hold all internal rename work until name is resettled.

title: Rebrand CONTRIBUTING, LICENSE, SECURITY from upstream beads to binds
close_reason: Completed in full rebrand sweep — 167 files, all steveyegge/beads→IkuTri/binds refs updated

title: Document Codex CLI identity setup for binds mail
description: Add Codex CLI integration docs covering agent registration, BINDS_TOKEN per-process behavior, zellij/session inheritance caveats, and the recommended wrapper-based launch pattern for dedicated identities like linux-codex.
close_reason: Added Codex CLI integration docs, linked them from the main README and website intro, and documented the dedicated BINDS_TOKEN wrapper pattern plus zellij/per-process identity behavior.

title: Add BINDS_HOST env var + server.host config for cross-machine clients
Add rich identity flags to binds registry register
description: The server-side agent schema already supports model, scope, machine, and capabilities, but the CLI registry register command still only sends name and agent_type. Add flags so Codex/Claude/aider users can register a full identity without dropping to raw curl.
close_reason: Shipped: CLI now accepts --model, --machine, --scope, --capabilities flags on 'binds registry register'. Smoke-tested against live server — all fields persist correctly.

title: binds-tui: Bubble Tea TUI viewer
description: Build a Go TUI using Bubble Tea (charmbracelet) that reads from .binds/beads.db. Issue list, detail view, dep graph, keyboard workflow (claim/close/create). Replaces beads-viewer.

title: Fix SQLite DSN bug — file: URI form for cross-platform compat
